div.class: h-100 w-100 w-md-75 m-auto py-3 px-5 d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-start text-center gap-3

div.h6:
There's no reason to panic,
you can still sign your document in a few clicks!

div.p: Links sent via email expire after a set delay to increase security.
You can request a new link to access your document and sign it, it will be delivered in your inbox right away.

div.small: A fresh link has just been sent to your inbox!
